description: Offline mapper that reads three service JSON files and emits one consolidated ATR export JSON, one bulk status manifest, and NDJSON by resource type.

steps: Load all source records from the three service files.
Build indexes by sourceId and by fhirId.
Construct Location resources for provider-side locations.
Construct Practitioner resources with full provider-shareable demographics.
Construct PractitionerRole resources that link Practitioner, Organization, and Location.
Construct Patient resources with ATR/US Core demographic payload.
Construct RelatedPerson resources for dependent subscriber cases.
Construct Coverage resources for all 50 members.
Construct a single Group resource for the contract-scoped attribution list.
Attach Group.member extensions for changeType, coverageReference, and attributedProvider.
Write NDJSON files grouped by FHIR resource type.
